business_case.speaker: npc
business_case.text: Before we build anything, we need to understand the business case. What problem are we really trying to solve?

choices.text: I want to learn about AI strategy.

strategy_response.speaker: npc
strategy_response.text: Excellent mindset! Strategy is about alignment - making sure AI efforts connect to real business value.

roi_response.speaker: npc
roi_response.text: Smart thinking. ROI isn't just about cost savings - it's about measuring transformation impact. You're already ahead of most.

casual_response.speaker: npc
casual_response.text: Fair enough. Take your time. When you're ready to talk strategy, you know where to find me.

closing.speaker: npc
closing.text: Come back anytime. We have much more to discuss.

welcome_back.speaker: npc
welcome_back.text: Good to see you again. How's your progress?

choices.text: I've been talking to the team.

delta_knowledge.speaker: npc
delta_knowledge.text: You talked to Delta? Good. Data quality is foundational. Without clean data, even the best AI strategy falls apart.

encouragement.speaker: npc
encouragement.text: That's normal. AI transformation is complex. Keep asking questions.
